mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_conn_log( "YEAR", "MONTH", "DAY", "HOUR", CONN_DE, PAGE_URL, MENU_ID, MENU_NM, MENU_DIV, USER_ID, BROWSER, DEVICE, IP, LOG_ACT, ACC_USER_ID, ACC_USER_INFO )VALUES( #{year}, #{month}, #{day}, #{hour}, #{connDe}, #{pageUrl}, #{menuId}, #{menuNm}, #{menuDiv}, #{userId}, #{browser}, #{device}, #{ip}, #{logAct}, #{accUserId}, #{accUserInfo} )

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LOG_SEQ), 0)+1 FROM t_login_log
INSERT INTO t_login_log( LOG_SEQ, USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, "YEAR", "MONTH", "DAY", "HOUR", LOGIN_DE, IP, DEVICE, BROWSER, "ROLE" )VALUES( #{logSeq}, #{userId}, #{loginId}, #{year}, #{month}, #{day}, #{hour}, #{loginDe}, #{ip}, #{device}, #{browser}, #{role} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_conn_log WHERE MENU_DIV = 'A' AND USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CONN_DE DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_login_log a LEFT JOIN t_user_info b ON a.user_id = b.user_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND DATE_FORMAT(login_de, '%Y%m%d') BETWEEN #{srchBeginDt} AND #{srchEndDt}
AND a.login_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{loginId}, '%')
AND b.user_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userNm}, '%')
